text:
There was an ant named Oliver. He liked adventures. One day Oliver decided to explore outside his anthills.

Olivar tiptoed cautiously. He passed through spider webs.

Olivar climbed trees. He felt a little dizzy but kept going.

Sometimes Oliver found chocolate crumbs. He savored them. He kept going.

Suddenly Oliver saw a cat. Oliver ran.

The cat chased him. Oliver zig zagged. The cat stopped. Oliver saw a window.

Olivar went in. The cat meowed. Oliver ran outside.

Suddenly Oliver tripped. He fell into a bowl of berries.

Oliver woke up berries. Oliver was full but scared. No cat.

Oliver went home. That's my adventure story.
